title: Snowkingdom 2 Pieces Silver Table Runner, Sequin Glitter Foil Metallic Thin Mesh Runner Roll 11"x108", Silver Table Decorations Centerpiece for Wedding Birthday Party Christmas
features: Metallic Silver Table Runner: Stylized polyester netting with metallic silver foil, easy care and long-lasting durability. Size - Width 11 inch x length 108 inch (2 PCS) .It can satisfy your daily use for most tables. Ramp up the glam with this shimmering silver runner

Unique Design:The silver glitter table runner can be cut to any length and shape according to your needs.You can use these table runners to decorate your rooms or for all kinds of DIY projects. They can be utilized as a backdrop for wedding parties and to wrap flowers

Silver Party Table Decorations:The metal foil printing exudes a subtle luster, add some luxury shimmer to your table with this wedding table runner very unique bringing an extra layer of glamour to your party. The modern chic look appearances can easily catch the eyes of your guests

Suitable Scenes: Perfect for wedding party, bridal & baby shower, birthday party, Halloween/ Thanksgiving/ Christmas party, graduation party, romantic candlelight dinner, holiday, valentine date, banquet, special events and daily use

Exquisite Setting: This party table runner can be given as a practical runner for your family or friends. The silver table decoration is wonderful for centerpieces, will enhance your home and dinning experience
description: Product Description Features: Polyester mesh with metallic foil, durable size:11 x 108 inches. Package includes 2 silver glitter table runners. Note: Simply wipe with a damp cloth if needed Safety Warning Warning: do not use near open flames.
